input.instructions: Search for scientific literature (specifically papers related to Hawking radiation, quantum gravity, and black hole thermodynamics) to identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. These are referred to as 'Black Hole Classicality Constants'. Retrieve the exact numerical values for all three constants.

variables.query: three universal dimensionless constants Black Hole Classicality Constants single-photon Hawking radiation

orchestration.decision_notes: The previous child nodes failed to identify the specific constants. I will attempt to use my internal knowledge to identify the specific paper or theoretical framework being referenced (likely related to the work of researchers studying the quantum-to-classical transition in Hawking radiation) and then synthesize the answer.
